home.heroTitle: Fresh from the Farm to Your Home
home.welcomeText: Fresh from the farm to your home. WARA products come directly from the farm to be delivered freshly to your doorstep. We emphasize on quality control to ensure you receive high quality fresh & 100% natural dairy products.
home.mission: At WARA, satisfying customers who are looking for healthy, fresh yet tasty dairy products is our top priority.
home.promotionText: Buy 4 Get 2 Free — Get two free yogurts when buying four bottles of milk.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Fresh, natural, and delicious dairy products made with care.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.story: Al Safat Fresh Dairy Co. (WARA) has been providing Kuwait with the freshest dairy products since 1976. We take pride in our quality control processes to deliver 100% natural Kuwaiti dairy products to your doorstep.
about.missionText: To provide our customers with the highest quality of milk, laban, yogurt, and juices with a superior level of service that exceeds anyone else in the market.
about.visionText: To become the biggest dairy factory in Kuwait with purely Kuwaiti products, recognized for our quality and freshness.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Delicious recipes made with WARA fresh dairy products.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: We bring freshness to your doorstep.
services.homeDeliveryText: Enjoy the convenience of having fresh dairy products delivered directly to your home. Our delivery service ensures you receive your products at their freshest.
services.buyOnlineText: Order your favorite WARA products online and pick them up from our nearest location. Coming soon!
services.downloadAppText: Get the WARA Fresh app for easy ordering and delivery tracking.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join the WARA Fresh family.
careers.noJobs: No open positions at the moment. Check back later!

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.payOnDelivery: Pay when you receive your order
checkout.confirmationText: Thank you for your order. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
